revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Chart_top%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This was created to allow for the width of ancestry boxes to adapt if there is a tall thumbnail to the right. Put it and {{Tlx|Chart bottom}} on separate lines from the Chart template they wrap around. == Options == ; {{Tlx|Chart top}} : by default, shows Family of X where X is the name of the article ; {{Tlx|Chart top|''title''}} : to change the title of the table ; {{Template link expanded|Chart top|2=background=''yellow''}} : to add a named color to the title. ; {{Tlx|Chart top|2=width=''100%''}} : to change the width of the table ; {{Tlx|Chart top|2=clear=right}} or {{Tlx|Chart top|2=clear=left}} : to push the table below any prior right or left floating elements ; {{Tlx|Chart top|2=clear=both}} : to push the table below any prior left or right floating elements :: note: width=100% typically will (in most cases) force the table to use the full page width, and push the table below floating elements) == Show/hide == This template will show a collapsed (fully-closed) version of the enclosed Chart when first seen on the page, with a "(show)" option for the reader. To show the reader on first sight an uncollapsed Chart, with a title bar with a "(hide)" option, add |collapsed=no. == Size warning == Remember "Avoid using smaller font sizes in elements that already use a smaller font size, such as infoboxes, navboxes and reference sections.", per [[MOS:ACCESS#Font size]] and [[:en:MOS:SMALLFONT|MOS:SMALLFONT]]. Use of the {{Tlx|Small}} template within a chart that uses this template produces a font size 75% of the page default, well below the 85% minimum specified in the linked guidelines. Per [[Wikipedia:Village pump (technical)/Archive 159#Infobox font size]], common text within an infobox is 88% of page default. Therefore use of this template in an infobox yields 74.8% of page default (0.88 * 0.85). == Tracking category == * {{clc|Pages using chart top with unknown parameters}} == See also == * {{Tlx|Chart bottom}} * {{Tlx|Tree chart}}, redirect from {{Tlx|Chart}} ** {{Tlx|Tree chart/start}}, redirect from {{Tlx|Chart/start}} ** {{Tlx|Tree chart/end}}, redirect from {{Tlx|Chart/end}} * {{Tlx|Ahnentafel}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Chart formatting templates]] [[Category:Genealogy formatting templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
